Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Thanks for coming all the way here for this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry, I just wanted someplace quiet to talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 5 13 18 5 115}Glad to hear that. I wanted someplace quiet to talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}After this, I have to pick my sister up from preschool, go shopping, cook dinner, do laundry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My mom had to do all this every single day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Remember how I told you I had a chance to win that scholarship?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Turns out I can't practice anymore. I just don't have the time for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Besides, even with the scholarship, we still can't afford college.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I mean, we don't even have enough to survive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}We already lost Dad, and now Mom can't work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I wish I could've taken you on one last time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I just wanted to run one more time. One last run at some big event. Just... one more time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Don't you think I want to!? There's nothing I CAN do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm gonna compete. Even if it's my last time, I want to win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'm gonna compete! Even if it's my last time, I want to win![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've dedicated most of my life to track and field.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's time to put everything I've learned to the ultimate test![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm glad we could talk. Everything feels a lot clearer now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Because of you, I have something to aim for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I helped Hayase figure himself out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're getting closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Crap, my sister's probably waiting for me... See ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Hayase[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
